title: Stir Fry with German Peppers
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry recipe using German peppers, a staple in many German dishes. This recipe is easy to make and can be served as a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat the stir in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the peppers and cook until they start to soften.
Add the german and fry. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in any additional seasonings you like.
Serve hot, garnished with crisp if desired.
